title: equilabium cinereum
intro: Equilabium cinereum, a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region, is a member of the family Asteraceae and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Equilabium cinereum include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to treat respiratory and inflammatory disorders.
